meta.title: AoD Podcast | Why A Reagan-Trump Foreign Policy Will Win the Cold War with China
meta.description: Matthew Kroenig and Dan Negrea, Authors of "We Win, They Lose: Republican Foreign Policy and the New Cold War" join the show not to wonder if a new cold war against the Chinese Communist Party is afoot, but rather explain that when it arrives we'll need a fusion of Ronald Reagan and Donald Trump foreign policies to ensure complete and total victory. Whether it's kinetic military capabilities, diplomatic willpower, or economic maneuvering, defeating China will require a whole-of-country approach.
